creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191199
Logfile for anki-v3.patch

Hrm, that is strange. I tested the anki-v3.patch file against a fresh ports tree and the patches were applied cleanly. 

Even the the FreeBSD patches for the Makefile and aqt/__init__.py were applied correctly.

Maybe I'm missing something here? I attached a logfile which contains the steps how the patches were applied.
